label: H3 quartic Alfven minimum is the structural ingredient absent from shear-flow-only treatments

provenance.source_span: Global m = 1 Stabilization of a Rotating Helical Z-pinch at Finite Pressure A. Kumar,1 J. C. Turner,2 A. Stepanov,2 T. Karminskaya,2 J. Flygare,2 J. Dadras,2 and C. Rea1 1 Plasma Science and Fusion Center, Massachusetts Institute of Technology, Cambridge, MA 02139, USA 2

strengths: Identifies H3 as the structural ingredient that separates Atlas from shear-flow-only arguments.
weaknesses: Needs source audit that comparator papers truly lack the H3 quartic mechanism rather than using different language.
